idea-plugin.name: Fish Browser
idea-plugin.description:
Fish Browser is a translucent, always-on-top web browser overlaid on your IDE, powered by the bundled JCEF (Chromium). Read docs or just browse while you work, then press the "boss key" to hide it instantly.

Features
  • Two modes — a draggable floating window, or a "background" that covers only the current editor area. Toggle with one shortcut.
  • Web vs. code — one key switches between using the page and writing code; in code mode the window dims and the mouse clicks through to your editor (Windows only).
  • Boss key to show/hide instantly. All shortcuts are customizable in Settings.
  • Follows the IDE — hides on minimize / when the IDE isn't focused; links open in place.
Note: the IDE's bundled Chromium ships without proprietary codecs (H.264/AAC), so many video sites (e.g. Bilibili) report "unsupported"; sites using VP9/WebM (e.g. YouTube) work. Best for text / reading. Mouse click-through is Windows-only.

中文：在 IDE 上浮一个半透明、可调透明度、可置顶的浏览器（基于 IDE 内置的 JCEF/Chromium）。 一边写代码一边看，老板来了一键隐藏。
  • 两种形态：可拖动的浮窗，或只盖住当前编辑区的「背景」，一个快捷键互转。
  • 网页 / 代码切换：一键在「用网页」和「写代码」间切；代码模式下窗口变暗、鼠标穿透到编辑器（仅 Windows）。
  • 老板键一键隐藏；所有快捷键都能在设置里自定义。
  • 跟随 IDE：最小化 / 失焦自动隐藏；链接原地打开。
注意：IDE 自带的 Chromium 没有商业编解码器（H.264/AAC），B 站等用 H.264 的视频站会提示「不支持」， YouTube 等 VP9/WebM 站可放；更适合看文字/阅读。鼠标穿透仅 Windows。
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.1.0
  • Background auto-fits the editor — it now follows your editor pane as you resize the IDE, toggle tool windows, or split editors. 背景自动跟随当前编辑器（拉伸 IDE / 开关工具窗 / 分屏都会重贴）。
  • Page zoom — from the toolbar, with Ctrl+Wheel, or in Settings; Ctrl+Shift+Wheel adjusts opacity. 页面缩放（工具栏 / Ctrl+滚轮 / 设置）；Ctrl+Shift+滚轮 调透明度。
  • Loading state — Reload becomes Stop while a page loads; Back/Forward disable when unavailable. 加载状态：刷新 ⇄ 停止、前进/后退自动置灰。
  • Search engine choice — Bing / Google / Baidu for address-bar searches; bare domains open directly. 地址栏可选搜索引擎 + 智能识别网址。
  • Bookmarks bar — star the current page; left-click to open, right-click to remove. 书签栏：☆ 收藏，左键打开、右键删除。
1.0.0
  • First release — translucent JCEF browser overlay; floating / background modes; web⇄code click-through; boss key; customizable hotkeys; follows the IDE. 首个版本。

action.description: 显示或隐藏摸鱼浏览器悬浮窗

action.text: 切换交互：网页 / 代码
action.description: 在网页交互和代码交互（鼠标穿透）之间切换
把浮窗最小化为背景（盖住代码编辑区），或从背景还原为浮窗
打开摸鱼浏览器设置：显示方式、透明度、跟随最小化、自定义快捷键
